source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Derive an expression for the intensity of the frequency spectrum $I(v)=|E(v)|^{2}$ of the wave train of harmonic oscillations having the finite duration $\tau_{c}$
\[
E(t)=\left\{\begin{array}{l}
E_{0} \cos \left(2 \pi v_{0} t+\phi_{0}\right), \quad-\tau_{c} / 2 \leq t \leq \tau_{c} / 2, \\
0, \quad|t|>\tau_{c} / 2 .
\end{array}\right.
\]

Determine the spectral-contour width $\Delta v$ at the halfmaximum depending on $\tau_{c}$.
extraction_notes: force_requires_image inferred from metadata field vision_relevance=essential and image caption, not from explicit figure reference in the question text
image_paths contains a PIL object string representation rather than a file path or URL
